---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a template, tool, or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that Brandrail makes hard today?

**The idea**
What would you like — a new archetype, a spec field, an SDK/CLI/MCP surface, a
publisher, etc.

**Would it stay on-brand & deterministic?**
Brandrail's promise is that nothing ships off-brand and output is reproducible.
Note how your idea fits that (e.g. tokens-only, fenced generation).

**Alternatives you've considered**
